inputs.label: Feed Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of the solute in the incoming feed stream.

businessContext_i18n.ar: تركيز المذاب في تيار التغذية الوارد.

inputs.label: Permeate Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of the solute in the permeate (filtered) stream.

businessContext_i18n.de: Konzentration des gelösten Stoffes im Permeat (Filtrat).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Concentration du soluté dans le flux de perméat (filtré).
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración del soluto en la corriente de permeado (filtrada).
